title: Classic 2D Items
description: A resource pack that brings back the 2D items like Classic 0.30
body:
This texture pack brings back the 2D items from Classic 0.30 which had no depth or perspective. It's as simple as that, and sword's textures are flipped.
![Sword and Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bd38dc118ac19103c5a06bcc5700df6e4a674de.png)
![Pickaxe and Torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8599f04a8f39e3a5d9919ac427f853ca63400bd.png)
![Axe and Shield, "CLASSIC" pixel art made of wood showing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af032af79a7292092f7156e18a598c5f9ada45cb.png)
